description: The owner of a 5-year-old solar farm is considering adding a battery storage system to the site.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the solar farm's historical generation profile and the amount of energy that is curtailed or sold at low prices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent quantifies the volume of energy that could be stored and sold later.

nodes.task_description: Size an economically optimal battery system to capture this energy and participate in ancillary service markets.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends a 4-hour duration battery with a specific MW rating.

nodes.task_description: Perform a financial analysis of the battery addition, calculating its IRR and NPV.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a complete financial case for the project.
